seo.title: How to Overcome FOMO in Trading
seo.description: FOMO (fear of missing out) can push traders into impulsive, high-risk decisions driven by emotion rather than strategy. This article explores the triggers behind FOMO and provides practical techniques to stay disciplined, manage risk, and trade with confidence.
